mission: Expose wrongdoing. Help humanity. Follow the documents. Map the system.
boundary: The core tracks public records, policy moves, mandates, pilots, contracts, court records, official releases, corporate filings, source-linked reporting, and clearly labelled speculation. It does not treat association, rumour, symbolism, or internet lore as proof.
maintenanceRule: Every automated maintenance run must be visible through a workflow log, generated report, artifact, commit message, issue, or public change log.

signalClasses.label: Public record
signalClasses.meaning: Court, law, official release, hearing, filing, contract, budget, treaty, or documented source item.

signalClasses.label: Reported record
signalClasses.meaning: Dated reporting that points to documents, named sources, or official statements.

signalClasses.label: Pattern
signalClasses.meaning: Multiple source-linked events showing a repeated institutional direction.

signalClasses.label: Convergence
signalClasses.meaning: Two or more systems connect, such as identity plus money, health, speech, travel, policing, AI, or energy.

signalClasses.label: Hypothesis
signalClasses.meaning: A structured question built from records, not a verdict.

signalClasses.label: Speculation
signalClasses.meaning: Motif, internet claim, symbolic reading, or open-source lead requiring stronger evidence.

signalClasses.label: Debunk lane
signalClasses.meaning: Claim-history and counter-source tracking for claims with weak, false, or unsupported source chains.

knowledge.title: Agenda 2030 / Global Standards / Policy Harmonisation

knowledge.boundary: Policy lane. Check evidence level before conclusion.

knowledge.title: Agenda 2030 as a control-grid blueprint
knowledge.summary: Agenda 2030 and SDGs are public policy frameworks. The speculation lane asks whether they converge with mandates, finance, identity, energy and speech rules; it does not prove secret coordination by itself.
knowledge.boundary: Speculation or motif lane. Classify before belief.

knowledge.title: One-world currency through CBDC and tokenized finance
knowledge.summary: CBDC pilots and payment-system documents are record items. A global currency conclusion requires evidence of mandate, integration, and lock-in.
knowledge.boundary: Speculation or motif lane. Classify before belief.

knowledge.title: One-world government through soft law and policy harmonisation
knowledge.summary: International cooperation is not automatically world government. Track enforceability, funding conditions, domestic mandates, and loss of local opt-out.
knowledge.boundary: Speculation or motif lane. Classify before belief.

knowledge.title: Digital ID as the permission layer
knowledge.summary: Digital ID can be convenience or fraud prevention. The dark claim only strengthens when ID becomes mandatory and connects to money, travel, speech, work or benefits.
knowledge.boundary: Speculation or motif lane. Classify before belief.

knowledge.title: CBDC plus digital ID plus social-credit-style compliance
knowledge.summary: Treat this as a convergence risk, not a proven finished system. Require records showing identity, payment, restriction and enforcement linkage.

knowledge.title: Frazzledrip claim-history / alleged media narrative
knowledge.summary: Track as claim-history and debunk lane only. Do not state that the alleged material exists. Do not host, request, describe, or link to illegal or exploitative material.
tags: how the claim redirects attention from document-based trafficking research
knowledge.boundary: No illegal material. No private victim names. No direct accusations. Treat as unverified extreme internet lore unless a lawful source-grade record appears.

knowledge.title: Pizzagate / coded-network claim cluster
knowledge.summary: Treat the specific criminal narrative as debunked unless new source-grade evidence appears. Keep it as a case study in coded-language interpretation, viral network storytelling, and real-world harm from unsourced accusations.
tags: how similar narratives attach to later Epstein releases
knowledge.boundary: Do not repeat the specific criminal allegation as fact. Classify documents, counter-sources, and source gaps.

knowledge.title: Adrenochrome motif / elite immortality rumour cycle
knowledge.summary: Track as myth-history, QAnon/Pizzagate-adjacent motif, and moral-panic pattern. Do not present harvesting or abuse claims as fact.
tags: how it merges with celebrity and trafficking claims
knowledge.boundary: Extreme claim. Track as mythology unless source-grade criminal evidence exists.

knowledge.title: Project Blue Beam / staged-sky-event narrative
knowledge.summary: Classic narrative revived during drone, UAP, hologram, AI-video, and disclosure cycles. Track as scenario speculation, not a confirmed plan.
knowledge.boundary: Track capability and narrative use. Do not claim a staged event is planned without primary records.

knowledge.title: Control-system fusion: ID + money + speech + movement
knowledge.summary: Strongest speculation lane because many components are public-record: digital ID, CBDC research, online safety law, health data systems, border biometrics, climate finance, and AI governance. The open question is integration and lock-in.
knowledge.boundary: Use convergence scoring. Do not claim a finished world-control system unless source-grade records show integration and lock-in.

knowledge.title: Jeffrey Epstein
knowledge.summary: Epstein is the central node: convicted sex offender, financier, social-access broker, property owner, travel/logistics hub, and correspondent in the released files and court record.
knowledge.boundary: No boundary issue on his convicted status; the boundary applies when attributing specific conduct to other named people.

knowledge.title: Ghislaine Maxwell
knowledge.summary: Maxwell was convicted and is also central to new litigation and released-document arguments. Her role is tied to recruitment, access, scheduling, social introduction, and later legal challenges.
tags: Convicted co-conspirator / logistics and access node
knowledge.boundary: Her conviction is established; her current habeas claims are litigation arguments unless a court accepts them.

knowledge.title: Donald Trump
knowledge.summary: Released/reported emails involving Epstein, Michael Wolff, and Maxwell raise questions about what Epstein claimed Trump knew and about presence/association references. Trump has denied knowledge of Epstein's crimes and denied wrongdoing.
tags: Named public figure / email and association lane
Email record / public denial / contradiction lane
knowledge.boundary: The email record supports that Epstein made claims and discussed Trump; it does not by itself prove Trump committed a crime.

knowledge.title: Michael Wolff
knowledge.summary: Reported email threads show Wolff and Epstein discussing political/media handling of Epstein-related questions around Trump.
knowledge.boundary: The emails show correspondence and strategy discussion; they do not prove every underlying claim inside the conversation.

knowledge.title: Virginia Giuffre
knowledge.summary: Giuffre's claims, litigation, public statements, settlements, and references in record reporting are central to the Epstein/Maxwell public record.
tags: Sworn claim / civil litigation / victim-record lane
knowledge.boundary: Use survivor claims respectfully and do not expose private victim information. Separate claims, settlements, court findings, and denials.

knowledge.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor
knowledge.summary: The public record includes Giuffre's allegations, Andrew's denials, a civil settlement, photo disputes, and reporting on email/contact material after claimed separation from Epstein/Maxwell.
tags: Court record / settlement lane / email-contact lane
knowledge.boundary: A settlement is not an admission of liability unless the settlement says so. Email/contact records support association and timeline questions, not automatic criminal findings.

knowledge.title: Leslie Wexner
knowledge.summary: Wexner is a key financial-access figure in Epstein's rise and is referenced in legal and reporting lanes around Epstein's finances and social access.
knowledge.boundary: Financial association and access do not automatically prove involvement in Epstein's crimes. They support the money-trail and legitimacy questions.

knowledge.title: Leon Black
knowledge.summary: The public record includes major payments to Epstein, internal institutional reviews, allegations/denials, and settlement/reporting lanes.
tags: Financial relationship / settlement and payment lane
knowledge.boundary: Payments and settlements must be separated from criminal findings. They are powerful money-trail evidence but not automatic proof of every allegation.

knowledge.title: Bill Gates
knowledge.summary: Recent reporting describes Gates testimony about Epstein presenting himself as a philanthropic intermediary and possible leverage using private reputational vulnerabilities. Gates has denied involvement in Epstein's sexual crimes.
knowledge.boundary: The record supports contact, testimony, and leverage questions; it does not prove Gates participated in Epstein's criminal conduct.

knowledge.title: Larry Summers
knowledge.summary: Reported emails show continued correspondence and advice-style exchanges after Epstein's conviction, making the record useful for elite-normalization analysis.
knowledge.boundary: Email contact does not prove criminal involvement. It supports questions about why Epstein retained access to elite circles after conviction.

knowledge.title: Alan Dershowitz
knowledge.summary: The public record contains allegations, denials, litigation, settlements/retractions, and extensive court-file material involving Dershowitz and Epstein-related claims.
tags: Court record / disputed claim / settlement lane
knowledge.boundary: Disputed allegations and litigation outcomes must be described precisely. Do not present a disputed claim as a conviction.

knowledge.title: Lesley Groff
knowledge.summary: Reported House Oversight testimony describes scheduling, errands, travel/accommodations, massage appointments, and image-forwarding while Groff denied knowing criminal conduct or victim status.
tags: Operational staff / scheduling and logistics lane
knowledge.boundary: Her testimony is a record item and must be tested against other records. Denial of knowledge and contrary claims should both be tracked.

knowledge.title: Bill Clinton
knowledge.summary: Flight-log references, reported travel, foundation/social access, public denials, and timeline overlap with Epstein properties and aircraft.
tags: Former president / flight and association lane
Flight/log/contact record / public denial / association lane
knowledge.boundary: Flight or contact records prove association/travel where documented; they do not by themselves prove knowledge of crimes or participation.

knowledge.title: Donald Trump
knowledge.summary: Emails involving Epstein, Michael Wolff and Maxwell; public denials; Palm Beach social proximity; disclosure politics; and the Epstein Files Transparency Act timeline.
tags: President / public figure / email, association and contradiction lane
Email record / public denial / contradiction lane
knowledge.boundary: Emails and association records support questions about knowledge, access and contradiction; they do not prove Trump committed a crime.

knowledge.title: Peter Thiel
knowledge.summary: Track reported references to meetings or planned meetings, technology-finance access, political network adjacency, and document-release source.
tags: Reported congressional-release meeting reference / elite network lane
knowledge.boundary: A meeting reference is not criminal evidence. It is an elite-access signal requiring date, source and document context.

knowledge.title: Steve Bannon
knowledge.summary: Track reported references to meetings, interviews, film/media projects, and political narrative overlap around Epstein disclosures.
tags: Political/media strategist / meeting and interview lane
knowledge.boundary: Media or meeting records do not prove involvement in Epstein crimes.

knowledge.title: Kathryn Ruemmler
knowledge.summary: Track reported Epstein emails involving legal/political commentary, elite-policy proximity, and post-government access networks.
tags: Former White House Counsel / legal-policy correspondence lane
knowledge.boundary: Email correspondence is a record of contact and content; it is not proof of criminal participation.

knowledge.title: Landon Thomas Jr.
knowledge.summary: Track reported correspondence about Epstein image, media strategy, reputation management and elite access.
knowledge.boundary: Media contact or discussion is not criminal evidence.

knowledge.title: Peggy Siegal
knowledge.summary: Track publicist/social access, reputation repair, event networks and public-response strategy.
tags: Publicist / social access and reputation lane
knowledge.boundary: Public relations or social access is not proof of criminal conduct.

knowledge.title: Matthew Menchel
knowledge.summary: Track reported personal meetings with Epstein after the 2007 plea-deal period and compare against prosecutorial-role timelines.
tags: Former Miami federal prosecutor / post-plea meeting-reference lane
knowledge.boundary: A reported meeting is an institutional conflict/appearance question, not proof of corruption without more evidence.
